Name: Intake Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Initial project application received and logged.

Name: Scoping Open
nepa_event_description__c: Scoping period opened; public notice issued.

Name: Scoping Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Scoping period closed; issues and alternatives identified.

Name: Draft EA Published
nepa_event_description__c: Draft Environmental Assessment published for public review.

Name: Comment Period Closed
nepa_event_description__c: Public comment period closed; comments received and logged.

Name: FONSI Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Finding of No Significant Impact signed by Authorized Officer.

Name: Decision Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Decision Record issued; project approved with mitigation measures.
